columns.extraction_plan: This information is not reported in the PDF. The baseline characteristics in Table 1 (page 5) provide details on metastasis stage at initial diagnosis (de novo vs. recurrent), but do not specify the type of previous local therapy (e.g., prostatectomy, orchiectomy, radiotherapy) for the recurrent mHSPC group in either the darolutamide (treatment) or placebo (control) arm.
